name: Multi-Agent Drone Coordination for Crate Transport
description: A decentralised multi-agent system teaching drones to coordinate crate transport without a central controller. Each agent acts on its own state and neighbour observations, with policies trained under randomised payload conditions.
fullDescription:
Teaching Drones to Coordinate Without a Central Controller

ARCHITECTURE DECISIONS
  • Each drone: own state + neighbour observations → independent policy → residual thrust + moment output

POLICY TYPE
  Independent per agent · no central controller. Centralised control is a single point of failure. Doesn't scale to a port fleet.

STATE SPACE
  Own state + neighbour observations. Coordination emerges from training · not hard-coded rules that break on edge cases.

ACTION SPACE
  Residual thrust + moment over a structured baseline. Better training stability. Maps cleanly to real actuator constraints.

TRAINING CONDITION
  Crate mass and size randomised throughout training. Variable payloads are the training condition · not an edge case the policy sees once.

name: Ground Control to Major Tom
description: Cloud-based ground control station with JWT access management, Flutter frontend, C2 link support, and real-time telemetry. Built for multi-platform drone operations from any browser or mobile device.
fullDescription:
Ground Control to Major Tom

A cloud-native ground control station built for real operational use — not a demo.

ACCESS MANAGEMENT
  • JWT authentication with role-based access control
  • Multi-operator support with granular permission scoping
  • Session management and audit logging

COMMAND & CONTROL
  • C2 link integration for direct vehicle uplink
  • Cloud-based relay with low-latency forwarding
  • Mission planning and waypoint management

TELEMETRY
  • Real-time telemetry streaming to cloud backend
  • Live state visualisation: position, attitude, battery, link quality
  • Historical flight data and replay

FRONTEND
  • Flutter — single codebase across mobile and web
  • Responsive portrait layout optimised for field use

name: Steve vs Gravity
description: Steve vs Gravity trains a Unitree G1 humanoid robot to perform natural locomotion by imitating motion
fullDescription:
Steve vs Gravity trains a Unitree G1 humanoid robot to perform natural locomotion by imitating motion capture data.

Key Highlights:
  • PPO with residual joint position actions — not absolute positions — for robust walking and dynamic movement
  • Motion data sourced from the LAFAN1 dataset, a high-quality human motion capture library
  • Motion retargeting performed using the GMR (General Motion Retargeting) pipeline, adapting human movements to the G1's morphology
  • Trained in simulation with domain randomisation for real-world transfer readiness

name: Drone Diffuser
description: A trajectory diffusion model that generates flight paths conditioned on map context and past sensor inputs. Features cross-attention sensor adapters, classifier-free guidance for noisy sensors, and graceful degradation under interference.
fullDescription:
Drone Diffuser — Trajectory Generation via Diffusion

A diffusion model that generates drone trajectories conditioned on map context and past observations.

CROSS-ATTENTION ADAPTERS
  Sensors plug in as adapters · not baked into the backbone. Any combination, any platform. Heterogeneous fleets supported by the architecture itself.

CLASSIFIER-FREE GUIDANCE
  Sensor reliability is weighted at inference time. A noisy sensor gets downweighted · not trusted blindly. Directly extends the confidence-weighting logic from PROGENY.

GRACEFUL DEGRADATION
  Multipath interference or signal spoofing detected · model continues on LiDAR and camera. No failure mode. Just a different conditioning signal.

name: Progeny Task79 - Modular Position Fusion System
description: A sensor-agnostic and platform-agnostic ROS package for position data fusion, designed to combine inputs from multiple sensors for robust, accurate estimation. Ideal for robotics and multi-sensor navigation platforms.
fullDescription:
A sensor-agnostic, platform-agnostic ROS package that addresses the critical challenge of sensor fusion in modern robotics.

Core Features:
  • Unified framework integrating LIDAR, cameras, IMUs, GPS, and other positioning sensors
  • Adaptive weighting algorithms that auto-adjust based on sensor reliability and environment
  • Real-time outlier detection with multi-threaded processing for minimal latency
  • Configurable fusion strategies for both indoor and outdoor navigation scenarios
  • Modular architecture — easily extensible to new sensor types and fusion algorithms

Ideal for:
  • Autonomous vehicles and mobile robots
  • Drone navigation and multi-sensor platforms

name: Bio-Inspired Rhythmic Locomotion with Quadruped Robot
description: Demonstrates a rhythm generator that naturally stimulates periodic motor patterns within reinforcement learning frameworks. Built using Stable-Baselines3 and Isaac Lab to enable robotics research on rhythmic locomotion in Python.
fullDescription:
Explores bio-inspired locomotion by implementing Central Pattern Generators (CPGs) within deep reinforcement learning, mimicking the neural circuits in animals that produce rhythmic movement.

Research Highlights:
  • CPG-driven leg coordination — emergent rhythmic patterns replace explicit gait programming
  • Built with Stable-Baselines3 and Isaac Lab for simulation-based training
  • Adaptive gait transitions and terrain-aware rhythm modulation
  • Real-time stability control for uneven terrain

Key Outcomes:
  • More natural and energy-efficient movement compared to classical RL baselines
  • Demonstrates the power of combining neuroscience insights with modern AI
  • Robust and adaptable across a variety of locomotion scenarios

name: SAGE - Smart Access & Governance Engine
description: A LangChain + LLM framework with PostgreSQL backend for automating role mining and access management workflows, reducing manual review time by over 50%. Features a FastAPI-based IAM chatbot supporting database queries, automated reporting, and admin actions such as password resets and access provisioning.
fullDescription:
SAGE revolutionises enterprise access management by combining large language models with traditional IAM systems, reducing manual review time by over 50%.

Core Capabilities:
  • Automatic role mining — analyses user behaviour, role relationships, and access histories to suggest role definitions
  • LangChain-powered natural language queries for complex access investigations
  • FastAPI IAM chatbot for conversational admin commands (provisioning, reporting, password resets)
  • ML algorithms that continuously learn from admin decisions to improve suggestions
  • PostgreSQL backend for enterprise-grade security and scalability

Integration & Scale:
  • Connects with popular enterprise directories
  • Supports multi-tenant configurations for large organisations
  • Anomaly detection for proactive access risk identification

name: AI LinkedIn Job Application Bot
description: Automates LinkedIn Easy Apply end-to-end: locates jobs, answers application questions using AI over your PDFs and notes, and logs everything in DuckDB. Focuses on reliability, concise responses, and seamless extensibility.
fullDescription:
Transforms the job application process by combining web scraping, NLP, and database management into a fully automated pipeline.

How It Works:
  • Navigates LinkedIn to find relevant jobs based on customisable criteria
  • AI parses application questions and generates contextual responses from your resume, cover letters, and personal notes (PDF)
  • DuckDB integration provides analytics on application patterns, response rates, and market trends

Key Features:
  • Smart duplicate detection prevents redundant submissions
  • Customisable response templates and rate limiting for stealth operation
  • Comprehensive logging and application tracking dashboard
  • Extensible architecture — easily integrates with other job boards and recruitment platforms

name: Bottube
description: Bottube scrapes Reddit posts, uses AI to craft and voice stories, generates visuals, produces a video, and uploads directly to YouTube. Integrates multiple AI models and media pipelines for seamless automated content creation.
fullDescription:
An end-to-end automated content creation pipeline that orchestrates multiple AI systems to produce YouTube videos from raw Reddit content.

Pipeline Stages:
  1. Scrape   — intelligently collects trending posts and comments from targeted subreddits
  2. Write    — NLP models craft compelling narratives from the scraped content
  3. Voice    — text-to-speech engines generate natural-sounding voiceovers with customisable profiles
  4. Visualise — AI art models generate relevant images, animations, and transitions
  5. Assemble — audio, visuals, and subtitles are synchronised with precise timing
  6. Upload   — content is automatically published with optimised titles, descriptions, and tags

Content & Analytics:
  • Supports multiple styles: storytelling, educational, commentary
  • Integrated analytics for performance tracking and optimisation

name: Project Jobs
description: Automated bot for logging job applications from Gmail, recruiter spam, and rejections into a spreadsheet. Integrates Gmail API, Google Sheets, and supports LLM-powered parsing (Ollama/ChatGPT), giving you clarity and organization in your job search.
fullDescription:
Streamlines job search management by automatically parsing and categorising all job-related email communications.

Data Pipeline:
  • Gmail API continuously monitors inbox for application confirmations, recruiter outreach, interviews, and rejections
  • LLM integration (Ollama for local processing or ChatGPT for cloud) enables intelligent email classification and data extraction
  • Google Sheets auto-populated with company, role, date applied, and current status

Smart Features:
  • Duplicate detection prevents redundant entries
  • Sentiment analysis tracks recruiter engagement levels
  • Visual dashboard with application funnel metrics, response rates, and market trends

Privacy Options:
  • Fully local mode via Ollama — no data leaves your machine
  • Cloud mode via ChatGPT for higher accuracy at scale

name: Soft SCARA Robot with Pneumatic Soft Gripper
description: An innovative soft robotics system featuring a SCARA robot equipped with a pneumatic soft gripper and YOLO CNN computer vision for automated egg palletisation. Combines soft robotics principles with advanced machine learning for delicate object handling.
fullDescription:
Integrates soft robotics and computer vision to create a fully automated egg palletisation system that handles fragile objects without breakage.

System Architecture:
  • SCARA configuration for precise, selective-compliance positioning
  • Pneumatic soft gripper made from compliant materials — adapts to egg shapes without excessive force
  • YOLO CNN for real-time object detection, classification, and position estimation

Control & Intelligence:
  • Force-sensitive gripping with adaptive pressure control
  • Adaptive motion planning coordinated with live vision feedback
  • Computer vision algorithms robust to varying lighting and egg orientations

Industrial Relevance:
  • Demonstrates bio-inspired soft robotics applied to food processing automation
  • Consistent and reliable palletisation validated through cycle testing
  • Potential for extension to other fragile or irregular-shaped objects
